goal: Find one or more new orthogonal signals that independently add informational value and improve the base system without cannibalizing it.
global_constraints: Base system active-signal-v1@1 is frozen — never modify its rules, thresholds, hours, days, or execution logic.
Only genuinely new signal classes are allowed — no retuning, permutation, or filter relaxation of existing base inputs.
Every hypothesis must pass the full funnel: standalone → stability → integration → cannibalization → final report.
No brute-force parameter search; use small logical grids only.
All negative, neutral, and positive results must be recorded in research memory.
Cannibalism must be explicitly measured before any promotion.

slices.title: Запуск цикла и фиксация инвариантов
slices.hypothesis: Lock the cycle around the immutable base and open a dedicated research project with a hypothesis map and naming scheme.
slices.objective: Lock the cycle around the immutable base and open a dedicated research project with a hypothesis map and naming scheme.
success_criteria: Open project exists, hypothesis map is initialized, cycle rules are recorded, baseline reference is saved.
evidence_requirements: Open project exists, hypothesis map is initialized, cycle rules are recorded, baseline reference is saved.

slices.title: Формирование пространства только новых гипотез
slices.hypothesis: Build a short-list of genuinely new signal families that are not permutations of the exhausted base input space.
slices.objective: Build a short-list of genuinely new signal families that are not permutations of the exhausted base input space.
success_criteria: Wave-1 short-list exists with each hypothesis having a written justification of novelty relative to the base and prior history.
evidence_requirements: Wave-1 short-list exists with each hypothesis having a written justification of novelty relative to the base and prior history.

slices.title: Data contract и feature contract для каждой новой семьи
slices.hypothesis: For every wave-1 hypothesis fix a precise data and feature contract — inputs, alignment, lookback, leakage surface — before any testing.
slices.objective: For every wave-1 hypothesis fix a precise data and feature contract — inputs, alignment, lookback, leakage surface — before any testing.
success_criteria: Each hypothesis has a clean data and feature contract with leakage risks explicitly addressed.
evidence_requirements: Each hypothesis has a clean data and feature contract with leakage risks explicitly addressed.
